title: Fig 1 in Development of specific PCR assays for the detection of Cryptocaryon irritans
author: Chen, W.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig 1 Agarose gel electrophoresis of PCR products amplified using conserved primer set P1/NC2 (a), Cryptocaryon irritans-specific primer set P1/S15 (b), and Ichthyophthirius multifiliis-specific primer set S01/S02 (c). Lanes 1 and 11 represent a DNA size marker. Lanes 2 to 9 represent C. irritans, Pseudokeroronpsis rubra, Pseudokeroronpsis carnae, Euplotes sp. 1, I. multifiliis, Pseudourostyla cristata, Paramecium caudaium (cf. Table 1), and host (fish) DNA, respectively. Lane 10 represents no-DNA control
steps_raw: Fig 1 Agarose gel electrophoresis of PCR products amplified using conserved primer set P1/NC2 (a), Cryptocaryon irritans-specific primer set P1/S15 (b), and Ichthyophthirius multifiliis-specific primer set S01/S02 (c). Lanes 2 to 9 represent C. irritans, Pseudokeroronpsis rubra, Pseudokeroronpsis carnae, Euplotes sp. 1, I. multifiliis, Pseudourostyla cristata, Paramecium caudaium (cf. Table 1), and host (fish) DNA, respectively. Lane 10 represents no-DNA control
